Container.Name: cashpilot-worker
Container.Overview: (CashPilot UI required separately) CashPilot Worker is the Docker agent that deploys and monitors passive income containers on this server. It requires Docker socket access and reports container health back to the CashPilot UI via heartbeats every 60 seconds. [br][br] Deploy one worker per server. Each worker manages local containers and reports status to the central CashPilot UI dashboard. [br][br] [b]Required:[/b] Set CASHPILOT_UI_URL to point to your CashPilot UI instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080) and use the same CASHPILOT_API_KEY as the UI. [br][br] The worker exposes a minimal status page on port 8081 showing connection status and local container list. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/CashPilot
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: passive income bandwidth sharing earnings money
Container.Requires: CashPilot UI container (cashpilot) must be running and accessible

Config.Name: Worker Port
Config.Description: Port for the worker mini-UI and API

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for container management. Required.

Config.Name: UI URL
Config.Description: URL of the CashPilot UI instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080). Worker sends heartbeats here.

Config.Name: API Key
Config.Description: Shared API key for UI authentication. Must match the key set on the CashPilot UI.

Config.Name: Worker Name
Config.Description: Human-readable name for this worker shown in the UI dashboard. Defaults to hostname if empty.
